alkylation reagent: alkylated for 30 min using 15 mM Iodoacetamide (IAA, Sigma-Aldrich, St. Louis, MO, USA)
alkylation concentration: alkylated for 30 min using 15 mM Iodoacetamide
cleavage agent: porcine trypsin (Promega, Madison, WI, USA) was added
fractionation method: separated by nano-reverse-phase high-performance liquid chromatography
instrument: performed using the Q-Exactive Plus Orbitrap BioPharma mass spectrometer
ionization type: peptides were introduced into the nano electrospray source (ESI)
labeling: In order to perform the label-free quantitation (LFQ)
reduction reagent: using 5 mM Dithiothreitol (DTT, Sigma-Aldrich, St. Louis, MO, USA)
